title: Jonathan Swift’s Last Joke | The New Yorker
description: Ed Caesar on the professor David Kenny, who tried to discover the true meaning of Jonathan Swift’s epitaph, which is situated at St. Patrick’s Cathedral in Dublin.

title: Anthropic tests Jupiter-v1-p before potential launch in May
description: Anthropic begins red teaming for Claude Jupiter V1 P ahead of its May 6th Code with Claude conference, pointing at a potential model launch.

title: America's Electricity Gap - by Joseph Politano
description: US Power Investment is at Record Highs, Driven by a Solar & Battery Boom. It's Still Not Enough to Meet Demand Growth.

title: Bun — A fast all-in-one JavaScript runtime
description: Bundle, install, and run JavaScript & TypeScript — all in Bun. Bun is a new JavaScript runtime with a native bundler, transpiler, task runner, and npm client built-in.

title: Bun is joining Anthropic | Bun Blog
description: Bun has been acquired by Anthropic. Anthropic is betting on Bun as the infrastructure powering Claude Code, Claude Agent SDK, and future AI coding products & tools.
